documentation.file_docstring: Telegram inline button utilities for model selection. Callback data patterns (max 64 bytes for Telegram): - mdl_prov              - show providers list - mdl_list_{prov}_{pg}  - show models for provider (page N, 1-indexed) - mdl_sel_{provider/id} - select model (standard) - mdl_sel/{model}       - select model (compact fallback when standard is >64 bytes) - mdl_back              - back to providers list
inline_comments: Parse a model callback_data string into a structured object. Returns null if the data doesn't match a known pattern.
Build provider selection keyboard with 2 providers per row.
Build model list keyboard with pagination and back button.
Skip models that still exceed Telegram's callback_data limit.
Truncate model ID for display, preserving end if too long.
Show last part with ellipsis prefix
Get page size for model list pagination.
Calculate total pages for a model list.
